raw_text:
Unofficial Translation by the Insurance Regulator of Cambodia

**Article 26.-**
        Director General of the I.R.C., Director of Licensing and Legal Affairs Department, all Department Directors under I.R.C., and all other relevant persons shall implement this Prakas according to their respective role from the date of signature.

**Phnom Penh, 27th October 2022**
**Deputy Prime Minister, Minister of Economy and Finance and**
**Chairman of the Council of Non-Bank Financial Services Authority**

***(Signed and stamped)***

**Akka Bandit Sapheacha Aun Pornmoniroth**

**Place to receive:**
- Office of the Council of Ministers
- Ministry of Economy and Finance
- Cabinet of Samdech Akka Moha Sena Padei Techo Hun Sen
  Prime Minister of the Kingdom of Cambodia
- National Bank of Cambodia
- Ministry of Commerce
- Ministry of Justice
- Cabinet of Samdech, His Excellency, Her Excellency Deputy Prime Minister
- His Excellency, Her Excellency as Vice-Chairman and Members of
  the Council of Non-Bank Financial Services Authority
  “For Information”
- As in Article 26
  “For Implementations”
- Royal Gazette
- Archives

Page 6 | 6
